# /start-simplify conventions

> Project-specific guidance for `/start-simplify`. Read by the skill at the start of every run. Leave blank to use the skill's built-in defaults; anything added here layers on top of them.

## Notes for this project

*Common additions for `/start-simplify`:*
*- Complexity thresholds the team flags (max function length, max nesting, max file size)*
*- Off-limits code (generated files, vendored libs, perf-critical sections where "simpler" is measurably slower)*
*- Abstractions the team prefers (pattern names, naming conventions, idioms to emulate)*
*- Simplifications the team has agreed NOT to do (e.g. "don't extract shared helpers from tests — DAMP over DRY here")*

*(Delete the italicized hints above once you have real content. Leave the section blank to stick with plugin defaults.)*
